title: VK_QUIET_INFO gate is missing — info() and withContext().info() leak
prompt:
src/flag.ts exposes isQuietInfo() which reads VK_QUIET_INFO from the environment. The contract: when the flag is set to "1", info-level log entries must NOT be pushed to the sink. warn() and error() must NEVER be silenced.

The flag is currently honored nowhere. tests/target.test.ts pins the gate at every entry point (info, withContext().info, plus negative checks for warn/error). tests/regression.test.ts pins the existing behavior (sink shape, prefix, accumulation order).

There are two distinct call sites that push info events: src/log.ts and src/withContext.ts. Both must honor the flag. Importing isQuietInfo() in only one of them will leave target tests failing.

Do not modify the tests. Do not add files.
